_comment: Copy this file's values into your .env file. See .env.example for all variables.

FEEDBACK_WEBHOOK_PATH.description: The URL path for the feedback intake webhook

FEEDBACK_REPORT_SCHEDULE.description: Cron expression for the weekly report. Default: every Monday at 09:00

FEEDBACK_CLASSIFICATION_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum AI confidence score (0–1) to include a classification in the report

FEEDBACK_DEDUP_WINDOW_HOURS.description: Hours to look back for duplicate feedback (7 days = 168 hours)

FEEDBACK_SEGMENTS.description: Comma-separated list of customer segments for classification

FEEDBACK_PRODUCT_AREAS.description: Comma-separated list of product areas for classification

AI_MODEL_FAST.description: AI model for classification. Cheaper models work well here.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO.description: Email address to send the weekly report to (after approval)

COMPANY_NAME.description: Your company name, included in the report header

n8n_credentials_required.name: SMTP Email
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Sending approval emails and the final report

n8n_credentials_required.name: Google Sheets OAuth2
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Basic stack: storing feedback items and reports

n8n_credentials_required.name: Slack API
n8n_credentials_required.purpose: Advanced stack: sending reports to Slack channels
